form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors four starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (29.83) at this track over 512m. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.
